title: The Flying Eye
writer: Darrell Catling, John Newton Chance, William C. Hammond
actors: David Hannaford, Julia Lockwood, Harcourt Williams
plot: Colonel Audacious is an inventor and with the help of his young assistant, Barnstuffer, he invents a model aeroplane with a TV camera attached that can then fly around revealing all sorts of goings on. After a few slapstick goofs ...
